author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for extracting a SlashCommandRegistry trait shared between TUI (src/tui/app.rs:586-1247, ~660 lines, 24 branches) and CLI (src/cli/repl/slash.rs, #232) dispatchers. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires a new src/commands/ module, trait Command with execute(ctx, args)->CommandOutcome, a CommandContext abstraction across the two seams, and a HashMap<&str, Box<dyn Command>> registry. Each existing branch is its own command struct migration. Companion ticket #232 covers the CLI side. Both must land together. Owner-level architectural work.
